creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #45)

Test a pure wave file.  I didn't hear a phase shift, just a light pop sound after ~60 seconds started after playing.  32bit at 4.8kHz.

However, thanks so much.  This device is not designed for PC uses (it's called portable audio amplifier -- with builtin battery, although I use it only with PC), and I'm glad that the problem is 99.99% solved.
